description: OpenClaw-style plain assistant turn with no structured-output requirement.

messages.content: You are a concise local coding assistant.
Summarize the risks of changing a parser in a local LLM harness in three short bullets.

description: Structured JSON response where validation is limited to JSON syntax and object shape.

messages.content: Create a status object with keys summary, risks, and next_steps for a local model harness update.

description: Tool-call structure test with no expected argument values beyond valid JSON.

messages.content: Use tools when they are needed.
Check the weather for Berlin in Celsius.

description: Coding response smoke test; validates only that content is nonempty and fence cleanup does not blank it.

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Return only Python code.
Write a small function named chunked(items, size) that yields lists of at most size items.
